2875.reason: [The error line number should correspond to the line of the last token in the expression, but list.before() returns the token before the current position, which may not be the last token of the expression. The correct line should be the line of the last token parsed in Exp.parse(), not the previous token in the token stream.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The error line number should correspond to the line of the last token in the expression, but list.before() returns the token before the current position, which may not be the last token of the expression. The correct line should be the line of the last token parsed in Exp.parse(), not the previous token in the token stream.]
